note: Combined Sprint 5.34-5.36 Trinity Materials Cache + Friendly Worker Onboarding + Dashboard Surfacing: three small compatible improvements landed on one branch trinity/materials-cache-worker-onboarding-v01. (A/5.34) Local cached Materials Project-style reference dataset at data/trinity/materials_project_cache_v01.json with CeO2/ceria + PrOx/praseodymia records; new schema schemas/trinity/materials_project_cache.schema.json ($id=trinity-materials-project-cache/v0.1) with locked source enum, sha-bound material_id pattern (^trinity-mpc-[a-z0-9-]+-v[0-9]+$), per-record record_sha256 + per-property-block property_hash_sha256 + file-level cache_sha256, every hash patterned ^[0-9a-f]{64}$. Backend (scripts/trinity/useful_compute_backends.py) gains _load_materials_project_cache (lazy, idempotent, sentinel on failure), _verify_cache_hashes (raises on any hash mismatch), _resolve_material_in_cache (case-insensitive alias lookup), materials_project_cache_info (read-only descriptor). _materials_engine_v01 now attaches FIVE new fields INSIDE the hashed output_obj: materials_project_cache_used (bool), materials_project_cache_version (str), materials_project_cache_sha256 (64-hex), materials_project_cache_hits (array of {query, material_id, formula_pretty, source, source_url_text, source_retrieved_at, record_sha256, property_hash_sha256}), materials_project_cache_misses (array of strings). Cache fields go INSIDE output_obj so per-record hash anchors land in compute_output_sha256 - cross-worker equality preserved because the cache file is byte-identical across hosts. Sprint 5.33 materials_engine_summary gains 5 cache surfacing fields (used/version/sha256/hit_count/miss_count). Result schema useful_compute_result.schema.json + materials_engine_result.schema.json extended additively; both summary $id and result $id unchanged. Tamper test confirms _verify_cache_hashes raises on any property mutation; engine fallback test confirms warning + non-crash when cache load_error is set. (B/5.35) New script scripts/trinity/worker_onboarding.py + schema schemas/trinity/worker_onboarding_bundle.schema.json ($id=trinity-worker-onboarding-bundle/v0.1) + config/trinity_worker_onboarding.example.json. Generates read-only deterministic bundle: schema, bundle_id (^twob-[0-9a-f]{16}$), worker_id (validated [A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,64}), worker_id_hash (sha16), pinned_time, supported_backends (6 entries with kind enum + experimental flag + note), required_commands (each with requires_wallet/requires_private_key/requires_network all const false), sample_paths, address_map_template (payout_address pattern ^<PAYOUT_ADDRESS_FOR_[A-Za-z0-9._-]+>$ - schema REJECTS real sost1+40hex), safety_checklist (7 entries), safety_status (6 const-true flags: no_wallet_required, no_private_key_required, no_seed_phrase_required, no_broadcast_capability, no_network_in_worker_process, bundle_carries_no_secrets). Tests assert bundle never contains a 64-hex blob (private-key shape) nor a real SOST address. Script forbids requests/urllib/httpx/aiohttp/socket/subprocess/shell=True/eval/exec/eclipse/secp256k1/sign_tx/sign_transaction/real_sign/sendrawtransaction/broadcast/chain-cli/anthropic/openai/langchain/transformers/llama_cpp. Bundle distribution is safe: contains zero secret material; operator replaces the payout placeholder out-of-band. (C/5.36) Dashboard (scripts/trinity/task_queue_dashboard.py) extended: _per_item_audit walks worker_out/TRINITY_USEFUL_COMPUTE_RESULT_*.json and surfaces FOUR new per-item fields - materials_project_cache_hits, materials_project_cache_misses, workers_seen, worker_ids_truncated (worker_id values capped at 32 chars). HTML render_html gains TWO new columns between materials_engine and operator_run: 'materials_cache' showing 'N hits (M misses)' painted #7dd3fc, and 'workers' showing 'N (worker-A, worker-B)'. task_queue_dashboard.schema.json extended additively. Sprint 5.28 privacy contracts preserved (no JS, no external assets, no absolute paths, html.escape on every text insertion). Tests: 1363 passed on the deployment host (1301 prior + 62 new = 18 cache functional + 13 cache schema + 6 cache safety + 19 onboarding functional + 6 onboarding safety; cross-worker compute_output_sha256 invariant re-asserted). Manual demo via the Sprint 5.31 classifier-derived request: backend output shows materials_project_cache_hits with CeO2 + PrOx hits and their record_sha256s, dashboard HTML shows '2 hits (0 misses)' + '2 (worker-A, worker-B)' columns, onboarding bundle for worker-C contains placeholder payout + 6 const-true safety flags + 6 supported backends. Pure scripts+schemas+data+docs+tests merge: zero src/, zero consensus, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes. Non-goals explicit: no live Materials Project API call (cache-only), no new wallet material, no new RPC, no new daemon, no new task_type/source_tool enums, no DFT.
